name: Runzo Coach
description: App Store & Play Store screenshots for an AI running coach app. Fresh park morning scene with layered rolling hills, a soft sun, floating chat bubbles, white chip cards and green tilted phone mockups.

elements.name: Coach text
elements.content:
Yes! Keep an easy pace.
Aim for 32 to 35 min.

elements.name: Adapt chip text
elements.content: Adapts to how you feel today

elements.name: Sub
elements.content:
Every week adjusts to your
pace, effort, and schedule.

elements.name: Sub
elements.content:
Start every session with a plan
that fits the day.

elements.name: Sub
elements.content:
Splits, pace, and route
saved automatically.

elements.name: Review text
elements.content: Finally a plan I stick to.
